title: 'Building castles in the air': Iran mocks Trump’s 'will get free oil, free Hormuz' claim amid deadlock
summary_full: Iran's state media has dismissed US President Donald Trump's claims of a negotiation breakthrough as "building castles in the air." Trump stated that Iran is close to a deal and has agreed to hand over its enriched uranium, a key point of contention in the ongoing conflict.
